title: Ubiquiti AF-11, airFiber 11
description: AF-11 is fullduplex ptp device with SISO/MIMO mode. The heart of the new airFiber 11 is INVICTUS 2 CPU designed for long distance, high transmission power up to 30dBm and throughput up to 1,2Gbps. The unit can be powered via DC terminal block (38 up to 56VDC) or via supplied passive PoE adapter (50V/1.2A) To change Tx and Rx frequency in SISO mode is necessary rotate duplexer. Completely link will have same duplexers on both sides (Low-Low or High-High) and even in the MIMO mode. Selection of Low or High duplexers is dependent on what frequencies will be allocated from the local Telecommunication Authority AirFiber 11 can operate in SISO (1 polarization) or MIMO (2 polarization) mode, depending on the local conditions of use. For SISO mode usage is necesary buy separately low or high duplexer (depends on freqeuncy what you want to use). For MIMO usage is necessary to buy 2 same duplexers AirFiber 11 without any duplexers works in very wide frequency band (10.7.GHz to 11.7GHz), bandwidth from 3,5 to 56MHz and using different Tx and Rx frequencies AF-11 device PoE adapter 50V/1.2A Power cord
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 1 x 1 (2 x 2 optionaly) Tx power [dBm] 30 Sensitivity [dBm] 95 Frequency range [MHz] 10700 - 11700 Maximum modulation 1024 QAM Channel bandwidth [MHz] 7, 10, 5, 30, 50, 14, 28, 20, 3,5, 56, 40 Wireless frequency 11 GHz Security 128bit AES Type of antenna Detachable Detachable antennas 4 Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (2) RSMA female LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps + (1) 10/100Mbps (managment) Power Power over Ethernet 50V DC PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 36 Power via connector/terminal 38 .. 56V DC Physical characteristics Purpose Outdoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 55 Weight [g] 2260 Width [mm] 112 Height [mm] 327 Depth [mm] 86 Hardware CPU INVICTUS 2 IC
